title: [Clone Firm] Warning: www[dot]novum-capital[dot]com
text: The Financial Market Authority (FMA) Liechtenstein points out that currently falsified letters are circulating, in which the address and logo of Novum Asset Management AG, Gewerbeweg 9, 9490 Vaduz (registration number: FL 0002.398.641 3) are being misused to create the false impression that these letters originate from Novum Asset Management AG. These letters are being sent with fraudulent intent to induce individuals to take actions that may be detrimental to them.   The FMA emphasizes that there is no connection between the website www[dot]novum-capital[dot]com, Nuvum Capital Services AG, Novum Investment Management Ltd, as well as the email addresses privat@novum-investment[dot]li and privat@novum-investment[dot]gb on the one hand, and the Liechtenstein-based Novum Asset Management AG on the other.
